title: Device Settings - Headset connected on Settings screen
scenario: Device Settings page options update correctly based on headset connection state, showing only disconnected options when headset is off and full options (except Remove Device) when headset is on
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Ensure a Poly Bluetooth headset is paired but currently powered OFF.
3. Navigate to the Home screen and tap on the paired device name to open the Device Settings page.
4. Observe the list of available options on the Device Settings page.
5. Power ON the Poly Bluetooth headset by pressing and holding the Power button until the LED indicator turns on.
6. Wait for the app to update the connection status (may take a few seconds).
7. Navigate back to the Home screen and tap on the device name again to open the Device Settings page.
8. Observe the list of available options on the Device Settings page.
expected: When the headset is powered OFF, the Device Settings page should show only options relevant to a disconnected device (e.g., Remove Device, Forget Device, or similar). When the headset is powered ON and connected, the Device Settings page should display all available options (e.g., Audio Settings, ANC, Transparency Mode, Equalizer, Notifications, etc.) except the Remove Device option.
